headline: How SpaceX volatility could impact your 401(k)
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Columnist Kerry Hannon joins Market Catalysts to discuss what SpaceX's (SPCX) volatility could mean for investors' 401(k) portfolios and shares advice on what retirement savers should consider amid market swings.
